description: Shared type definitions for dev.cocore.account.* methods.

apiKeyView.description: Public metadata for a single API key. Never contains the secret — the full key is returned exactly once, by createApiKey, and is unrecoverable afterwards. The server persists only a SHA-256 hash of the secret plus the displayable `prefix`.

id.description: Stable identifier for this key. Pass it to revokeApiKey / deleteApiKey.

did.description: DID of the account that owns this key.

name.description: Human-readable label set at creation time.

prefix.description: First characters of the key (e.g. `cocore-AbCd1234`), stored in plaintext so a key can be recognised in a list without revealing the secret.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiry. Absent means the key never expires on its own.

revokedAt.description: Set when the key was revoked. A revoked key no longer authenticates but the row survives for audit until deleteApiKey removes it.

lastUsedAt.description: Last time the key successfully authenticated a request. Absent if never used.
